Appearances:
Plaintiff Devendra Patel is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christopher Dodenhoff is present.
Attorney Paul Hogarth representing the defendant.

The settlement attorney Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement per Mr. Hogarth, which was NOT filed. The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
